_comment: Importable n8n workflow skeleton for the Celebration demo backend. Import via n8n > Workflows > Import from File. Then: (1) open the HTTP Request node and attach an Anthropic Header Auth credential instead of the placeholder key, (2) set Allowed Origins on the Webhook node to your GitHub Pages origin, (3) Activate. Node param names can vary slightly by n8n version — if a field doesn't match, see 07-n8n-build-guide.md for the manual setup.
name: Celebration Homes Demo - AI Assistant
